posts.title: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise Launches Wefunder Regulation CF Community Round
posts.excerpt: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise, Inc. officially launches its community investment round on Wefunder, targeting between $50,000 and $124,000 under Regulation CF.
posts.body: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise, Inc. officially launches its community investment round on Wefunder, targeting between $50,000 and $124,000 under Regulation CF. The raise is structured as a Revenue Share Loan offering investors 3% of gross revenue until they receive a 2.2X return (early bird) or 1.9X return (standard). The minimum investment is $100, making this opportunity accessible to everyday investors who want to participate in small business acquisition from the ground up.

posts.title: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise Completes Delaware C Corporation Conversion
posts.excerpt: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise, Inc. successfully converts from a Florida LLC to a Delaware C Corporation, establishing the institutional foundation for its multi-vertical acquisition strategy.
posts.body: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise, Inc. successfully converts from M.J.E.R.D Enterprise LLC (Florida) to a Delaware C Corporation, establishing the institutional legal foundation required for its multi-vertical acquisition strategy. The company is foreign-qualified in Florida, headquartered in Boynton Beach, and operates under EIN 41-3584270.

posts.title: Ur Gains Fitness Identified as First Acquisition Target
posts.excerpt: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise identifies Ur Gains Fitness as its primary first acquisition target, generating $61,379.77 in documented gross revenue from January through October 2025.
posts.body: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise identifies Ur Gains Fitness as its primary first acquisition target in the Fitness & Wellness vertical. The business generated $61,379.77 in documented gross revenue from January through October 2025, demonstrating real operational traction and a loyal customer base in the South Florida market.

posts.title: M.J.E.R.D Enterprise Founded
posts.excerpt: Martin J. Dacelin founds M.J.E.R.D Enterprise with a singular vision: to build the Berkshire Hathaway of small business.
posts.body: Martin J. Dacelin founds M.J.E.R.D Enterprise with a singular vision: to build a diversified holding company that acquires, optimizes, and scales profitable small businesses across four core verticals — Fitness & Wellness, Automotive, SaaS, and Franchise.
